response.step_by_step_log: The video features a live concert performance by multiple Hololive characters. I identified the song title 'Shiny Smily Story' and the performing group 'hololive IDOL PROJECT' from the on-screen text shown at 01:05. I used the search string '"Shiny Smily Story" hololive Japanese and English lyrics' to find the lyrics.
response.global_summary: A live concert performance of the song 'Shiny Smily Story' by members of the hololive production, featuring various camera angles of the performers dancing.

scenes.description: The song 'Shiny Smily Story' is performed by multiple Hololive virtual performers on a brightly lit concert stage with a cheering crowd in the background.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
どこまでも続くこの道を
一人歩く寂しさも
もしも辛い時も
もう私は
一人じゃないから

だからもっと夢を追いかけたい
ワクワク止まらない
想像を越えてく
世界見せてあげる
アクセル死んでもしてみたい
後悔なんてさせない
それぞれ違った心で
走れ

Shiny Smily Story
Shiny Smily Story
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I want to keep walking down this path that goes on forever
Even the loneliness of walking alone
Even if there are tough times
I'm already
Not alone anymore

So I want to chase my dreams even more
I can't stop the excitement
I'll show you a world
That goes beyond imagination
I want to try to go all out until I die
I won't let you have any regrets
With our different hearts
Let's run

Shiny Smily Story
Shiny Smily Story
